subject: [RFC PATCH v4 04/27] mm/page_alloc: Add private node handling to build_zonelists

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: The patch author has posted an RFC patch to introduce private node handling to build_zonelists. The change aims to ensure that N_MEMORY nodes are used as fallbacks for kernel allocations in private nodes.
sentiment_signals: no clear signal from the author

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch series introduces private node handling to the build_zonelists function, ensuring that N_MEMORY nodes are used as fallbacks for kernel allocations in private nodes. The approach involves adding a new condition to handle private nodes and modifying the build_zonelists_in_node_order function to accommodate this change.
